productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Checks Brown Shirt
description: Composition Brown, grey and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with button closure cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned front placket, two patch pockets with buttoned closures, embroidered branding on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Warm iron Bring the zing back to formal wear with this US Polo shirt. The cotton fabric ensures optimal comfort and the stylish design earns a definite fashion accolade. Pair it with formal trousers, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
